asset.title: Ic Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates importing a new account into the research spreadsheet with clear provenance tracking in the room trace. The UI is clean and the workflow is complete.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates pasting comma-separated text to import a new account row into the research table.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire flow from clicking import, pasting data, submitting, and seeing the updated table and trace.

visualDesign.evidence: Modern dark mode interface with clear layout, though some text truncation occurs in the table cells.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the product story of collaborative rooms, structured spreadsheets, and activity traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live web application showing real-time UI updates and state changes.

legibility.evidence: Text is generally readable, though small in the trace log and partially cut off in the account column.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for investment teams managing pipelines and tracking deal provenance.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the manual CSV/text parsing interface without overpromising automation.

observedEvidence: Row addition to the Research spreadsheet
Room trace update showing 'Maya imported 3 Research row(s)'

defects.observed: The imported account name 'Atlas Maritime Partners' is truncated to 'Atlas Maritime Part...' in the table cell.
defects.fix: Adjust column width or enable text wrapping to prevent truncation of key entity names.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Import and track new opportunities instantly with full provenance and team attribution in your shared research room.
